name: Webflow Homepage Redesign
description: Redesign homepage hero, navigation, and footer in Webflow. New banner photo from October 2026 outdoor service.

name: Sermon Archive Migration
description: Migrate 47 WordPress sermon posts to Webflow CMS collection via API. Custom fields: date, pastor, scripture reference, audio URL.

name: Online Giving Integration
description: Stripe Payment Element on /give page. Three giving categories: Tithes, Building Fund, Missions. 501(c)(3) verified. Receipt email confirmation.

name: Event Calendar Plugin Upgrade
description: Update The Events Calendar plugin with full 2026 church schedule: VBS, Picnic, Back-to-School, Revival, Homecoming, Thanksgiving, Christmas Cantata.

name: SSL Certificate Renewal
description: Renew SSL cert for legacy.shilohbaptistbiloxi.org expiring 2027-01-14. Certbot cron repaired. Cloudflare API token permissions fixed.

name: Mobile Responsive Audit
description: Audit all pages for mobile responsiveness. Fix nav overlap on iOS 17. Test on iPhone, Android, and tablet breakpoints.

name: Contact Form Rework
description: Rework contact form SMTP configuration. Switch to Gmail SMTP via WP Mail SMTP with church Google Workspace credentials.

name: Staff Directory Page
description: Maintain and update /staff page. Add Rev. Darnell Hooks (Associate Pastor, March 2026) with headshot and bio.

name: Weekly Bulletin PDF Upload System
description: Webflow CMS Bulletins collection with date, title, PDF file fields. Gloria Tate manages weekly Friday uploads via Webflow Editor.

name: Social Media Feed Integration
description: Custom Instagram oEmbed on homepage. Lighter than Smash Balloon plugin. Requires Instagram Business account connection.

name: Children Ministry Page
description: Updated /childrens-ministry with 2026 curriculum: Kingdom Kids (ages 3-5), Roots & Wings (ages 6-10). New teacher roster added.

name: Volunteer Sign-up Form
description: Webflow form at /vbs-volunteers for VBS 2026 volunteer registration. Fields include background check consent. Routes to vbs@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org.

name: Prayer Request Form
description: Repair prayer request form delivery to pastor@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. Investigating Webflow domain email blocklist issue with Webflow support.

name: Church History Page
description: Upload revised 75th anniversary church history copy from Pastor Wilkins. Compress and upload 12 anniversary photos.

name: Building Renovation Announcement Page
description: Create /renovation page announcing the Fellowship Hall and parking lot expansion projects. Include committee member list and giving category for Building Fund.

name: Building Committee Meeting Minutes
description: Document and publish Building Committee meeting minutes. Dorothy Hammond (secretary) transcribes; Calvin posts to internal share drive.

name: Parking Lot Expansion Planning
description: Property survey for 20-space east lot expansion. City of Biloxi permit requirements research. John Baker coordinating with city offices.

name: Fellowship Hall Renovation
description: Scope renovation: new flooring, kitchen upgrades, HVAC replacement. Obtain 3 contractor bids. Lamar Boykin coordinating.

name: Media Donation Tracking
description: Track designated Building Fund donations separately from general tithes. Theresa Nguyen maintaining spreadsheet; Calvin to automate via Stripe metadata once giving portal launches.

name: Annual Budget Report Page
description: Publish annual church budget summary on the website as a PDF. Members have requested transparency on Building Fund allocation. Dorothy Hammond to prepare PDF; Calvin to post.
